metadesc: Tournament FIFA 18 mingguan ke-6 di Kitamen Shah Alam. Sertai kaki FIFA rebut hadiah wang tunai, warmup percuma dan aksi padu setiap minggu. Daftar sekarang!
Kejohanan PES 2018 2v2 di Kitamen Sungai Petani, diiktiraf PES Malaysia dan Konami. Kumpul geng PES anda untuk kelayakan rantau utara. Daftar di sini!
A throwback to Kitamen Legends Street Fighter, Road to Saigon. Relive the moments Malaysia’s fighting game community gathered to celebrate the love of gaming.
Professional broadcast and livestream services in Malaysia by KITAMEN. Multi-camera, graphics overlays, replays and caster audio for TV-grade esports shows.
Sports and esports event management in Malaysia by KITAMEN. Playmaster-trained crews, certified referees and full broadcast ops for schools and brands.
The KITAMEN Doctrine: a roadmap for Malaysian esports built on structure over spectacle. Open memorandums, career frameworks and gold-standard Playmaster ops.
Sewa PS5 di Malaysia bersama KITAMEN untuk acara, parti dan kejohanan esports. Konsol terkini 4K, pakej PlayPod premium dan pengalaman gaming tiada tandingan.
KITAMEN event cancellation and refund policy for our organised tournaments. Learn the conditions, the seven-day notice period and how to request a refund.
KITAMEN prize money policy for official esports tournaments. Understand the general rules, recipient eligibility and how to claim your winnings the right way.
KITAMEN personal data protection statement under the PDPA 2010. Learn how your personal data is processed, your rights and our commitment to safeguarding it.
Page not found on the KITAMEN site. Sorry, this link may have moved or been removed. Head back to our homepage to explore our esports tournaments and services.
The KITAMEN knowledgebase. Find answers, guides and official resources on our tournaments, esports services and gaming operations all in one convenient place.
Contact KITAMEN for questions about tournaments, console rentals, broadcast and esports services in Malaysia. Reach our team easily and get the help you need.
